raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 316 would reinstate a provision of the law that charges a serial thief with a felony if they have three or more prior theft-related convictions and are convicted again of petty theft.",
    "Proposition 47, approved by voters in 2014, was designed to ensure the criminal justice system focused on violent and serious offenses.",
    "The passage of Proposition 47 has led to unintended consequences, resulting in increased economic and psychological damage to businesses and individuals.",
    "Currently, theft of property that does not exceed $950 in value is considered petty theft and punishable as a misdemeanor.",
    "Senate Bill 316 would increase the penalties for petty theft to a felony for individuals with three prior theft-related convictions.",
    "After the passage of Proposition 47, property crime has increased, impacting communities and businesses."
  ]
}
```
